steps: Marinate fish with half the curry paste, salt, pepper, and some citrus juice; set aside briefly.
Heat oil and saute onions, ginger/galangal, and garlic for 2-3 minutes.
Add remaining curry paste and cook 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add coconut milk and fish; simmer gently until fish is opaque and cooked through.
Stir in coriander, remaining citrus juice, and palm sugar; garnish with basil and serve with rice.
tips: Simmer gently to keep fish pieces intact; taste and balance salty (fish sauce/salt), sour (lime), and sweet (palm sugar).
